StopRule: Frozen pre-2021 discovery. Both eras profitable and no more than 2% below same-era control. Center continuous net >= control +4%; CAGR >= control +0.06 point; PF >= control; DD <= min(1.20%, control +0.10 point); recovery and return/DD >=97% control. At least 4 of 6 neighbors pass both eras, continuous net >=control +2%, same PF/DD/97% efficiency floors. Confirmed behavior change required. No post-result rescue.
